notes: Deterministic subject is the reproducible equality target.
Any proof material that varies across signings must be outside the subject.
Envelope may include timestamps, identity-bound signing material, and transparency evidence.
Envelope verification is separate from subject reproducibility.

frontier_alignment_notes: Later workstreams may encode signatures and transparency evidence using Sigstore bundles and in-toto aligned statements.
This contract does not assert Sigstore or in-toto completion; it only defines boundaries and binding rules.
